news.title:

PPFAS sold RIL stocks worth ₹595 crore and Jio Financial shares amounting to ₹135 crore.

news.title:
Mutual funds added HDFC Bank, Suzlon, Groww; sold Tata Steel, Power Grid, Inox Wind in March.
Equity inflows hit Rs 40,450 cr in March; healthcare, IT, telecom holdings rose, financials trimmed.

news.title:
Kotak Mahindra AMC's $3B fund bets on defense, financial stocks, with Astra Microwave, Bharat Electronics as key holdings.
Defense firms gain from policy support, while financials like HDFC Bank, IndusInd Bank, and Bajaj Finance attract post-selloff interest.

news.title:
BNP Paribas cuts Nifty 2026 target by 11% to 25,500, citing oil shock from US-Iran conflict.
Favored stocks include Infosys, HDFC Bank, ICICI Bank, and Ultratech Cement, with up to 88% upside.

news.title:

news.title:
HDB Financial Services will announce Q4 and FY26 results on April 15, including dividend considerations.
Shares of HDB Financial Services traded 2.9% higher at Rs 633 but declined 14.8% over 6 months.
news.summary:

news.title:
Domestic MFs bought ₹34,800 crore in banking stocks, led by HDFC Bank and ICICI Bank, as FPIs exited ₹1.12 trillion in equities in March.
Bank Nifty fell 17% in March but rebounded 10% in April; MFs showed confidence in banking sector's long-term growth.
news.summary:
Domestic MFs bought ₹34,800 crore in banking stocks, led by HDFC Bank and ICICI Bank, as FPIs exited ₹1.12 trillion in equities in March.
Bank Nifty fell 17% in March but rebounded 10% in April; MFs showed confidence in banking sector's long-term growth.

news.title:
Macquarie favors HDFC Bank and ICICI Bank due to attractive valuations amid margin pressures in India's banking sector.
HDFC Life and SBI Life are also preferred. PSU banks face weak Q4 due to treasury losses and tight liquidity.

news.title:
HDFC Bank, ICICI Bank, CRISIL, and Swaraj Engines lead expected dividend announcements this week, with Swaraj Engines projecting Rs 109.2/share.
Investors should monitor record dates like Muthoot Finance's April 17 ex-dividend date and consider banking, engineering, and insurance sectors for opportunities.
news.summary:

news.title:
